collections.name: Dirty Dog
description: Some dogs find trouble. Some dogs find mud. Dirty Dogs find both.
This collection is dedicated to the muddy puddle champions, garden wreckers, ditch divers and professional mess makers who always seem to come home looking proud of themselves.
If bath time is a regular event in your house, this collection was made for you.
collections.seoTitle: Dirty Dog Collection | Muddy, Mischievous & Proud Dog Art
collections.seoDescription: Celebrate the dogs who never stay clean for long. Funny muddy dog artwork and gifts featuring chaos, adventure and the pups who always find the mess.

collections.name: Snorefather
description: For the dogs who run the house, control the sofa, and somehow get away with absolutely everything.

The Snorefather collection celebrates the four-legged bosses of the family. The dogs who demand tribute in treats, insist on the best seat in the house, and somehow manage to look innocent every time they break the rules.
Available across multiple breeds and products, this collection is perfect for dog owners who know exactly who is really in charge.
collections.seoTitle: Snorefather Collection | Funny Mafia Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: The boss is sleeping. Discover hilarious mafia-inspired dog artwork featuring nap-loving pups, family drama and the ultimate canine godfather.

collections.name: Woof Business
description: Some dogs act like they own the house. Others act like they own the entire company.
Woof Business is for the confident dogs with CEO energy. The dogs who supervise everything, judge everyone and somehow always look like they're in charge of the operation.
Professional. Powerful. Slightly ridiculous. Exactly as intended.
collections.seoTitle: Woof Business Collection | Funny Boss Dog Art & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Big attitude. Bigger treats. Explore dog artwork inspired by business bosses, hustlers and four-legged entrepreneurs running the show.

collections.name: Who's Walking Who
description: Every dog owner has asked the question. Who's actually walking who here?

This collection celebrates the dogs who pull, drag, negotiate and generally take charge of every walk. Whether it's a quick trip around the block or a full-scale adventure, some dogs have very strong opinions about where they're going.
If your dog thinks the lead is merely a suggestion, this collection was made for you.
collections.seoTitle: Who's Walking Who Collection | Funny Dog & Human Role Reversal
collections.seoDescription: Dogs take charge while humans follow along. A hilarious collection celebrating the truth every dog owner already knows.

collections.name: Redneck
description: A little rough around the edges. Proud of it.
Redneck Dog celebrates country living, muddy boots, old trucks, fishing trips and dogs who would rather be outdoors than anywhere else.
Perfect for owners who appreciate simple pleasures, big personalities and a good sense of humour.
No pretence. Just good dogs and good times.
collections.seoTitle: Redneck Dog Collection | Country Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Mud, trucks, fishing and good times. Funny country-themed dog artwork inspired by rural life and dogs who love the outdoors.

collections.name: Work Like A Dog
description: Somebody has to keep this place running.
The Worked Like A Dog collection celebrates hardworking dogs everywhere. The grafters, the supervisors and the dogs who somehow manage to look exhausted despite sleeping most of the day.
For anyone who's ever felt overworked, underpaid and in desperate need of a treat.
collections.seoTitle: Work Like A Dog Collection | Hardworking Dog Artwork
collections.seoDescription: For dogs carrying the workload while everyone else watches. Funny artwork celebrating determination, loyalty and canine work ethic.

collections.name: Football Dog
description: Some dogs chase balls. Yours has a transfer value.
The Football Dog collection is for the sport-mad pups and their equally obsessed owners. Match-day energy, a great first touch, and absolutely no respect for the offside rule.
For the dog who thinks every ball in the park belongs to them, and they might be right.
collections.seoTitle: Football Dog Collection | Sporting Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Champions on four legs. Football-inspired dog artwork packed with action, competition and sporting spirit.

collections.name: FMX Dog
description: Some dogs walk. Yours sends it.
The FMX Dog collection is built for the adrenaline junkies. The zoomie champions, fence-leapers and full-send merchants who hit the garden at warp speed and ask questions later.
For the dog with no brakes and no fear. Helmet optional.
collections.seoTitle: FMX Dog Collection | Motocross Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: High-flying motocross action meets man's best friend. Extreme sports dog artwork inspired by freestyle motocross and adrenaline.

collections.name: BBQ Cheeseburger Tax
description: Every meal comes with a tax. Your dog collects it.
The BBQ Cheeseburger Tax collection is for the professional beggars. The puppy-eyes specialists, plate-watchers and under-the-table negotiators who believe every barbecue is a shared event.
For the dog who has never once let a sausage hit the floor unclaimed.
collections.seoTitle: BBQ Cheeseburger Tax Collection | Funny Food-Loving Dog Art
collections.seoDescription: Every barbecue comes with a tax collector. Funny dog artwork celebrating cheeseburgers, snacks and the legendary cheese tax.

collections.name: Hog Dogs
description: Built for the dogs who were born to ride.
Hog Dogs celebrates freedom, adventure and the four-legged rebels who would rather be out exploring than sitting quietly at home.
Inspired by classic biker culture with a canine twist, this collection is packed with attitude, character and road-trip energy.
For dogs who live life in the fast lane.
collections.seoTitle: Hog Dogs Collection | Biker Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Ride hard, nap harder. Biker-inspired dog artwork featuring motorcycles, road trips and dogs living life on their own terms.

collections.name: Love You
description: Simple. Honest. Timeless.
Love You celebrates the bond between dogs and the people who adore them.
Whether it's a gift for someone special or a reminder of your own four-legged best friend, this collection focuses on the thing dog owners understand better than anyone else.
Unconditional love.
collections.seoTitle: Love You Collection | Cute Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Sweet, funny and full of personality. Dog artwork celebrating friendship, affection and the special bond between dogs and humans.

collections.name: I'll Be Bark
description: Part dog. Part machine. All attitude.
The I'll Be Bark collection is inspired by action heroes, sci-fi legends and the dogs who seem impossible to stop.
Built for owners who love big personalities, bold artwork and dogs that never back down.
Resistance is futile. Treats are mandatory.
collections.seoTitle: I'll Be Bark Collection | Funny Cyborg Dog Artwork
collections.seoDescription: Part dog. Part machine. All attitude. Sci-fi inspired canine artwork with futuristic action and humour.

collections.name: Scooz Me Hooman
description: Scooz me, hooman. Your dog has a request. Several, actually.
The Scooz Me Hooman collection is for the polite-but-persistent attention seekers. The paw-on-the-knee, head-on-the-lap, staring-until-you-notice types who always need just one more thing.
For the dog who is far too well-mannered to demand, but absolutely will not be ignored.
collections.seoTitle: Scooz Me Hooman Collection | Funny Dog Expressions & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: The face every dog owner recognises. Humorous artwork celebrating curiosity, treats, walks and canine misunderstandings.

collections.name: And Beyond
description: Some dogs see the garden. Yours sees infinity.
The And Beyond collection is for the big-dream dogs and the owners who love them. The explorers, the wanderers, the ones who treat every walk like a mission to somewhere new.
For the dog who is always looking past the fence to whatever is next.
collections.seoTitle: And Beyond Collection | Space Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Adventure reaches new galaxies. Fun space-themed dog artwork packed with imagination, humour and canine exploration.

collections.name: Ninja
description: You didn't see them take it. That's the point.
The Ninja collection is for the stealthy operators. The silent sock thieves, counter-surfers and masters of the disappearing snack. One blink and the sandwich is gone.
For the dog who moves in total silence, right up until the packet rustles.
collections.seoTitle: Ninja Collection | Warrior Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Stealth, honour and treats. Action-packed dog artwork inspired by ninjas, warriors and legendary canine heroes.

collections.name: Got Mail
description: Your dog has one job. Defend the letterbox.
The Got Mail collection is for the delivery-obsessed dogs. The window-guards and postman-announcers who treat every parcel like a national security event.
For the dog who is certain that, without them, the mail would simply get in.
collections.seoTitle: Got Mail Collection | Funny Delivery Dog Artwork
collections.seoDescription: The delivery has arrived. Funny dog artwork celebrating letters, parcels and every dog's obsession with the post.

collections.name: Hear No Bell
description: Some dogs never quit.
The Hear No Bell collection is inspired by the stubborn, determined dogs who refuse to back down no matter what life throws at them.
Whether they're chasing balls, demanding another walk, or convincing you they're still hungry after dinner, these dogs are built differently.
For the fighters. The battlers. The dogs who never hear the bell.
collections.seoTitle: Hear No Bell Collection | Boxing Dog Artwork & Gifts
collections.seoDescription: Still standing. Funny boxing-inspired dog artwork celebrating determination, resilience and the fighting spirit of every pup.

products.name: Summer Short Sleeve Tee
products.description: Our most popular everyday t-shirt. Soft, comfortable and designed to show off your favourite Canine Keepsakes collection wherever you go. Perfect for dog walks, weekends and explaining to strangers why your dog is better than theirs.
products.seoTitle: Funny Dog T-Shirts | Summer Short Sleeve Tee
products.seoDescription: Premium dog-themed t-shirts featuring unique canine artwork, humour and personality. Comfortable everyday wear for dog lovers.

products.name: Summer Long Sleeve Tee
products.description: A comfortable long-sleeve option for cooler days. Ideal for autumn walks, lazy weekends and anyone who thinks every outfit can be improved with a dog-themed conversation starter.
products.seoTitle: Funny Dog Long Sleeve Shirts | Summer Long Sleeve Tee
products.seoDescription: Lightweight long sleeve dog-themed apparel featuring original canine artwork. Perfect for cooler evenings and year-round wear.

products.name: Winter Short Sleeve Tee
products.description: A premium-feel heavyweight t-shirt built to last. With a more substantial fit and feel, this is the perfect choice for dog owners who like quality clothing and original artwork in equal measure.
products.seoTitle: Dog Lover T-Shirts | Winter Short Sleeve Tee
products.seoDescription: Comfortable premium dog t-shirts featuring original artwork and memorable canine characters. Designed for everyday wear.

products.name: Winter Long Sleeve Tee
products.description: Warm, comfortable and easy to wear. A dependable everyday layer featuring your chosen Canine Keepsakes collection and breed.
products.seoTitle: Dog Lover Long Sleeve Shirts | Winter Long Sleeve Tee
products.seoDescription: Warm and comfortable long sleeve shirts featuring unique dog artwork and humorous canine designs.

products.name: Classic Sweatshirt
products.description: The kind of sweatshirt that quickly becomes your favourite. Comfortable, versatile and ideal for showing off your chosen collection while staying warm on colder days.
products.seoDescription: Cosy sweatshirts featuring original dog artwork, funny characters and unique canine-inspired designs.

products.name: Pullover Hoodie
products.description: The throw-on hoodie you'll end up wearing far more than you planned. Warm, comfortable and built around original Canine Keepsakes artwork. Perfect for dog walks, weekends and refusing to stop talking about your dog.
products.seoDescription: Premium hoodies featuring original canine artwork and humorous dog designs. Warm, comfortable and perfect for dog lovers.

products.name: Zip-Up Hoodie
products.description: Easy to wear, easy to layer and impossible for dog lovers to ignore. Features your chosen Canine Keepsakes collection on a practical everyday zip hoodie.
products.seoTitle: Dog Lover Zip Hoodies | Zip-Up Hoodie
products.seoDescription: Comfortable zip-up hoodies featuring unique dog artwork and canine-themed designs for everyday wear.

products.name: Women's Relaxed Tee
products.description: A soft relaxed-fit tee designed for comfort and everyday wear. Featuring original Canine Keepsakes artwork inspired by the dogs that make life more entertaining.
products.seoTitle: Women's Dog Lover T-Shirts | Relaxed Fit Tee
products.seoDescription: Relaxed fit women's t-shirts featuring original dog artwork and charming canine-inspired designs.

products.name: White Glossy Mug
products.description: The easiest way to make every cup of tea about your dog. A glossy ceramic mug featuring your chosen collection and breed. Perfect for home, work and reminding visitors where your priorities really lie.
products.seoTitle: Funny Dog Mug | White Glossy Mug
products.seoDescription: Enjoy your favourite drink with original dog-themed artwork printed on a high-quality glossy mug.

products.name: Black Glossy Mug
products.description: Everything people love about our mugs, with a darker finish. A daily reminder of your favourite collection and the dog who inspired it.
products.seoTitle: Funny Dog Coffee Mug | Black Glossy Mug
products.seoDescription: Stylish black mug featuring unique dog artwork and memorable canine characters. Ideal for coffee, tea and gifts.

products.name: Pet Bowl
products.description: Custom printed pet bowl — personalise it for your dog.
products.seoDescription: Feed your dog in style with unique canine artwork printed on a durable pet bowl designed for everyday use.

products.name: Kiss-Cut Stickers
products.description: Small in size. Big in attitude. Perfect for laptops, notebooks, water bottles and anywhere else that deserves more dog artwork.
products.seoTitle: Dog Lover Stickers | Kiss-Cut Sticker Collection
products.seoDescription: High-quality stickers featuring original dog artwork, funny canine characters and collectible designs.
